name: Mon Garn Bandan Ruk
original_name: มนตร์กาลบันดาลรัก
overview: A young columnist, Namneung, prays to a mysterious goddess after a series of personal setbacks, only to wake up three years in the future—married to a man she never expected, Songklot, and confronted with a life she doesn’t recognize, including a happy version of herself in their wedding photos.

trailers.title: มนตร์กาลบันดาลรัก [Official Teaser]
